title: elatostema heyneanum
intro: Elatostema heyneanum, also known as the Indian creeping thyme or variegated Elatostema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Elatostema heyneanum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
